empty.title: No announcements yet
empty.body: When admins send announcements, they'll show up here.

published.title: No sent announcements
published.body: Tap + to compose a new announcement.

scheduled.title: No scheduled announcements
scheduled.body: Tap + to compose a new announcement.

draft.title: No drafts
draft.body: Tap + to compose a new announcement.

confirm.title: Replace draft?
confirm.body: This will overwrite your current title + body.

discard.title: Discard?
discard.body: Your unsaved changes will be lost.

schedule.title: Pick a future time
schedule.body: Schedule must be at least 1 minute in the future.

readonly.recalled: This announcement has been recalled and cannot be edited.

recall.title: Recall announcement
recall.body: A recall notification will be sent to all recipients.
recall.reasonPlaceholder: Sent in error / Updated event details
